mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,0),'YYYY') FROM DUAL) AS YYYY ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,0),'MM') FROM DUAL) AS MM ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('S') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,0),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS S_POINT ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('U') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,0),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS U_POINT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-1),'YYYY') FROM DUAL) AS YYYY ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-1),'MM') FROM DUAL) AS MM ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('S') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-1),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS S_POINT ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('U') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-1),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS U_POINT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2),'YYYY') FROM DUAL) AS YYYY ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2),'MM') FROM DUAL) AS MM ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('S') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS S_POINT ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('U') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-2),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS U_POINT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3),'YYYY') FROM DUAL) AS YYYY ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3),'MM') FROM DUAL) AS MM ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('S') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS S_POINT ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('U') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-3),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS U_POINT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-4),'YYYY') FROM DUAL) AS YYYY ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-4),'MM') FROM DUAL) AS MM ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('S') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-4),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS S_POINT ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('U') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-4),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS U_POINT FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT (SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-5),'YYYY') FROM DUAL) AS YYYY ,(SELECT TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-5),'MM') FROM DUAL) AS MM ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('S') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-5),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS S_POINT ,NVL(( SELECT SUM(NCPT.POINT) AS POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS NCPGBB ,NMCP_CUST_POINT_TXN NCPT WHERE NCPGBB.POINT_CUST_SEQ = NCPT.POINT_CUST_SEQ AND NCPGBB.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo} AND NCPT.POINT_TRT_CD IN ('U') AND TO_CHAR(NCPT.POINT_TRT_DT,'YYYYMM') = TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,-5),'YYYYMM') ),0) AS U_POINT FROM DUAL ORDER BY YYYY,MM
SELECT POINT_CUST_SEQ ,TOT_ACU_POINT ,TOT_USE_POINT ,TOT_REMAIN_POINT ,TOT_EXTINCTION_POINT FROM NMCP_CUST_POINT_GIVE_BASE_BAS WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{cntrNo}

SELECT COUPN_CTG_CD ,COUPN_CTG_NM ,COUPN_DIV_CD ,(SELECT NCD.DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL NCD WHERE NCD.DTL_CD = NCCB.COUPN_DIV_CD AND NCD.CD_GROUP_ID='BE0005') AS COUPN_DIV_NM ,COUPN_CTG_BAS_DESC ,COUPN_OUTSIDE_VENDR_NM ,COUPN_QNTY ,SORT_ODRG ,USE_YN ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE ,EXCH_POINT ,COUPN_AMT FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS NCCB WHERE 1 = 1 AND POINT_EXCH_POSBL_YN = 'Y' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PSTNG_START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND PSTNG_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ORDER BY SORT_ODRG ASC, CRET_DT DESC

SELECT COUPN_CTG_CD ,COUPN_CTG_NM ,COUPN_DIV_CD ,(SELECT NCD.DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL NCD WHERE NCD.DTL_CD = NCCB.COUPN_DIV_CD AND NCD.CD_GROUP_ID='BE0005') AS COUPN_DIV_NM ,COUPN_CTG_BAS_DESC ,COUPN_OUTSIDE_VENDR_NM ,COUPN_QNTY ,SORT_ODRG ,USE_YN ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE ,EXCH_POINT ,COUPN_AMT ,POINT_EXCH_POSBL_YN ,SMS_SND_POSBL_YN ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_COUPN_OUTSIDE_BAS WHERE COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd} AND SVC_CNTR_NO IS NULL) AS COUPN_QNTY_CNT FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS NCCB WHERE 1 = 1 AND COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd} AND POINT_EXCH_POSBL_YN = 'Y' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PSTNG_START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND PSTNG_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT count(*) FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS NCCB WHERE 1 = 1 AND POINT_EXCH_POSBL_YN = 'Y' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND PSTNG_START_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND PSTNG_END_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS')

SELECT NVL(REAL_COUPN_NO,COUPN_NO) AS COUPN_NO ,(SELECT COUPN_CTG_NM FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS BAS WHERE COU.COUPN_CTG_CD = BAS.COUPN_CTG_CD) AS COUPN_CTG_NM , COUPN_AMT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_COUPN_OUTSIDE_BAS COU WHERE 1=1 AND SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SMS_SND_YN = 'N' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getUsedCoupInfoList*/ NVL(REAL_COUPN_NO,COUPN_NO) AS COUPN_NO ,(SELECT COUPN_CTG_NM FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS BAS WHERE COU.COUPN_CTG_CD = BAS.COUPN_CTG_CD) AS COUPN_CTG_NM , COUPN_AMT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_COUPN_OUTSIDE_BAS COU WHERE 1=1 AND SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND SMS_SND_SUCCESS_YN = 'Y' AND SMS_SND_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE UNION SELECT NVL(REAL_COUPN_NO,COUPN_NO) AS COUPN_NO ,(SELECT COUPN_CTG_NM FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS BAS WHERE COU.COUPN_CTG_CD = BAS.COUPN_CTG_CD) AS COUPN_CTG_NM , COUPN_AMT , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE , SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_COUPN_OUTSIDE_BAS COU WHERE 1=1 AND SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') NOT BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE

SELECT COUPN_NO , COUPN_CTG_CD , COUPN_AMT , REAL_COUPN_NO , USE_YN , PSTNG_START_DATE , PSTNG_END_DATE , COUPN_GIVE_DATE , USER_ID , SVC_CNTR_NO , SMS_RCV_NO , SMS_SND_YN , SMS_SND_DT , SMS_SND_SUCCESS_YN FROM NMCP_COUPN_OUTSIDE_BAS WHERE COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd} AND SVC_CNTR_NO IS NULL AND SMS_SND_YN = 'N' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getMbershipInfoList*/ B.COUPN_NO, A.COUPN_CTG_CD, A.COUPN_CTG_NM, A.SMS_SND_POSBL_YN, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE, SVC_CNTR_NO FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS A, NMCP_COUPN_MBERSHIP_BAS B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.COUPN_CTG_CD = B.COUPN_CTG_CD AND B.SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo} AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN B.PSTNG_START_DATE AND B.PSTNG_END_DATE ORDER BY B.PSTNG_START_DATE, B.PSTNG_END_DATE

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getMbershipDtl*/ B.COUPN_NO, A.COUPN_CTG_NM, A.SMS_SND_POSBL_YN, GET_CODE_NM('BE0021', A.TP_CHRG) TP_CHRG, B.SMS_RCV_NO, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS PSTNG_END_DATE, A.AV_PRD, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.COUPN_GIVE_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS COUPN_GIVE_DATE, A.USE_PLC, A.THUMB_IMG_PC, A.THUMB_IMG_MO, A.LINK_PC, A.LINK_MO FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS A, NMCP_COUPN_MBERSHIP_BAS B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.COUPN_CTG_CD = B.COUPN_CTG_CD AND A.COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd} AND B.COUPN_NO = #{coupnNo}

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getMbershipList*/ A.COUPN_CTG_CD, A.COUPN_CTG_NM, A.COUPN_CTG_BAS_DESC, A.COUPN_OUTSIDE_VENDR_NM, A.THUMB_IMG_PC, A.THUMB_IMG_MO, A.IMG_DESC, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_COUPN_MBERSHIP_BAS WHERE COUPN_CTG_CD = A.COUPN_CTG_CD AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND COUPN_GIVE_DATE IS NULL) LEFT_QNTY, A.COUPON_CATEGORY, A.BENEFIT_DESC, A.BENEFIT_DESC_DTL, A.USAGE_WAY, A.USAGE_DESC, A.CONTACT, A.COUPON_LABEL
,CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_COUPN_MBERSHIP_BAS WHERE COUPN_CTG_CD = A.COUPN_CTG_CD AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') - SUBSTR(COUPN_GIVE_DATE, 1, 6) < (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'BE0023' AND DTL_CD = A.DN_STAN) ) >= (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MCP_USER_CNTR_MNG WHERE USERID = #{userId}) THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DOWN_POSSIBLE_YN
FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS A WHERE 1 = 1 AND COUPN_DIV_CD = 'MB' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE
AND ( A.COUPN_CTG_CD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT COUPN_CTG_CD FROM NMCP_COUPN_PLAN_REL WHERE DEL_YN ='N') OR A.COUPN_CTG_CD IN (SELECT DISTINCT COUPN_CTG_CD FROM NMCP_COUPN_PLAN_REL WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND DEL_YN ='N') )
ORDER BY SORT_YN DESC, CASE WHEN SORT_YN = 'Y' THEN SORT_ODRG END ASC, PSTNG_START_DATE, PSTNG_END_DATE, COUPN_CTG_CD DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS WHERE COUPN_DIV_CD = 'MB' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS A WHERE 1 = 1 AND COUPN_DIV_CD = 'MB' AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN PSTNG_START_DATE AND PSTNG_END_DATE
AND ( A.COUPN_CTG_CD NOT IN (SELECT DISTINCT COUPN_CTG_CD FROM NMCP_COUPN_PLAN_REL WHERE DEL_YN ='N') OR A.COUPN_CTG_CD IN (SELECT DISTINCT COUPN_CTG_CD FROM NMCP_COUPN_PLAN_REL WHERE RATE_CD = #{rateCd} AND DEL_YN ='N') )

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getMbershipDetail*/ COUPN_CTG_CD, COUPN_CTG_NM, COUPN_CTG_BAS_DESC, COUPN_OUTSIDE_VENDR_NM, SMS_SND_POSBL_YN, DN_STAN, AV_PRD, USE_PLC, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(USE_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS USE_START_DATE, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(USE_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'),'YYYY.MM.DD') AS USE_END_DATE, THUMB_IMG_PC, THUMB_IMG_MO, IMG_DESC, IMG_CONTENT_PC, IMG_CONTENT_MO, LINK_PC, LINK_MO, BENEFIT_DESC, BENEFIT_DESC_DTL, USAGE_WAY, USAGE_DESC, CONTACT FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS WHERE 1 = 1 AND COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd}

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getCouponDupInfo*/ COUPN_CTG_CD, DN_STAN, COUPN_NO, COUPN_GIVE_DATE FROM ( SELECT A.COUPN_CTG_CD, (SELECT EXPNSN_STR_VAL1 FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'BE0023' AND DTL_CD = A.DN_STAN) AS DN_STAN, B.COUPN_NO, B.COUPN_GIVE_DATE FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS A, NMCP_COUPN_MBERSHIP_BAS B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.COUPN_CTG_CD = B.COUPN_CTG_CD AND A.COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd} AND B.USER_ID = #{userId} AND B.SMS_RCV_NO = #{smsRcvNo} ORDER BY B.COUPN_GIVE_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getCouponInfoForSms*/ A.COUPN_CTG_CD, A.COUPN_CTG_NM, A.SMS_SND_POSBL_YN, B.COUPN_NO, A.LINK_MO, B.PSTNG_END_DATE, B.SMS_RCV_NO FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS A, NMCP_COUPN_MBERSHIP_BAS B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd} AND A.COUPN_CTG_CD = B.COUPN_CTG_CD AND B.USER_ID = #{userId} AND B.SMS_RCV_NO = #{smsRcvNo} AND B.AMD_ID = #{userId} AND SUBSTR(B.COUPN_GIVE_DATE, 1, 8) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getCouponLeftQnty*/ COUNT(*) LEFT_QNTY FROM NMCP_COUPN_MBERSHIP_BAS WHERE 1 = 1 AND COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND COUPN_GIVE_DATE IS NULL

/* MyBenefitMapper.getCouponMenuAccessCnt */ SELECT SUM(MENU_SEQ_CNT) FROM MV_MCP_ACCESS_TRACE WHERE MENU_SEQ IN ( SELECT MENU_SEQ FROM NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS WHERE URL_ADR IN ('/coupon/couponMain.do', '/m/coupon/couponMain.do') )

SELECT /*MyBenefitMapper.getBenefitCouponDetail*/ COUPN_CTG_CD, COUPN_CTG_NM, COUPN_OUTSIDE_VENDR_NM, THUMB_IMG_PC, THUMB_IMG_MO, IMG_DESC, BENEFIT_DESC, BENEFIT_DESC_DTL, USAGE_WAY, USAGE_DESC, CONTACT FROM NMCP_COUPN_CTG_BAS WHERE COUPN_CTG_CD = #{coupnCtgCd}
